recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Green Arrow
recommendations.overview: At an airport, the Emerald Archer must protect a young princess from assassins.

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Jonah Hex
recommendations.overview: When a ruthless brothel madame murders Jonah Hex's current quarry, the disfigured bounty hunter plans to make her pay.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
recommendations.overview: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Spider-People charged with protecting the Multiverse's very existence. But
recommendations.director: Joaquim Dos Santos, Kemp Powers, Justin K. Thompson

recommendations.title: Superman/Shazam!: The Return of Black Adam
recommendations.overview: Chosen the world’s protector against the Seven Deadly Enemies of Man – pride, envy, greed, hatred, selfishness, laziness and injustice – young Billy Batson accepts his destiny as Captain Marvel. Battling alongside Superman against nefarious Black Ada

recommendations.title: Murder on the Orient Express
recommendations.overview: Genius Belgian detective Hercule Poirot investigates the murder of an American tycoon aboard the Orient Express train.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 1
recommendations.overview: Batman has not been seen for ten years. A new breed of criminal ravages Gotham City, forcing 55-year-old Bruce Wayne back into the cape and cowl. But, does he still have what it takes to fight crime in a new era?

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time IV: Journey Through the Mists
recommendations.overview: When Littlefoot grandfather falls ill, The dinosaurs only way to cure him is a flower in the forbidding land of mist which hold unexpecting perils and danger.

recommendations.title: The Girl by the Lake
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates the murder of a beautiful teen girl left naked by a lake.

recommendations.title: Puss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale
recommendations.overview: After tumbling into a magic storybook, Puss in Boots must fight, dance and romance his way through wild adventures as he searches for an escape.
